scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n engine,worker,insight,insight-w,dashboard -c blue,green,cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev --workspace=@apkaya/engine" "npm run worker --workspace=@apkaya/engine" "npm run dev --workspace=@apkaya/insight" "npm run worker --workspace=@apkaya/insight" "npm run dev --workspace=@apkaya/dashboard"
